mapper.select: select id, book_id as bookId, sort, enabled, create_time as createTime from home_recommend order by sort asc, id desc
select id, book_id as bookId, sort, enabled, create_time as createTime from home_recommend where enabled = 1 order by sort asc, id desc
mapper.insert: insert into home_recommend(book_id, sort, enabled) values (#{bookId}, #{sort}, #{enabled})
mapper.update: update home_recommend set enabled = #{enabled} where id = #{id}
